_comment: We maintain the list of REFERENCE doc versions to publish here. The build (scripts/sync-reference.mjs) fetches the upstream manifest, resolves each version's docs tarball (url + sha256), downloads + verifies it, and regenerates reference/ (current) and reference_versioned_docs/version-<v>/. None of that generated content is committed. To publish a new version, add it to `versions` (newest first) and set `current`.
